heading: Civilian faculty members at certain Department of Defense schools: employment and compensation
label: 1595 Civilian faculty members at certain Department of Defense schools: employment and compensation

Effect of 1992 Amendments on Current Employees, , , provided that:Pub. L. 102–484, div. A, title IX, § 923(b)106 Stat. 2474Oct. 23, 1992“In the case of a person who, on the day before the date of the enactment of this Act [], is employed as a professor, instructor, or lecturer at the Foreign Language Center of the Defense Language Institute, the Secretary of Defense shall afford the person an opportunity to elect to be paid under the compensation plan authorized by , United States Code, or to continue to be paid under the General Schedule (with no reduction in pay) under , United States Code.”Oct. 23, 1992section 1595(b) of title 10section 5332 of title 5

children.heading: .—Authority of Secretary
children.label: a .—Authority of Secretary
children.text: The Secretary of Defense may employ as many civilians as professors, instructors, and lecturers at the organizations specified in subsection (c) as the Secretary considers necessary.

children.heading: .—Compensation of Faculty Members
children.label: b .—Compensation of Faculty Members
children.text: The compensation of persons employed under this section shall be as prescribed by the Secretary.
The Foreign Language Center of the Defense Language Institute.
The English Language Center of the Defense Language Institute.
The Western Hemisphere Institute for Security Cooperation.
The Defense Institute for Security Governance.
The Defense Institute of International Legal Studies.
The United States Element of the Inter-American Defense College.

children.heading: NDU.—Application to Faculty Members at
children.label: d NDU.—Application to Faculty Members at
children.text: In the case of the National Defense University, this section applies with respect to persons selected by the Secretary for employment as professors, instructors, and lecturers at the National Defense University after .February 27, 1990
